Enum Class OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator>
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator>, Constable
Enclosing class:
OverloadedOperatorHandler
public static enum OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator extends Enum<OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator>
Enumeration of all arithmetic operators which can be overloaded.

      public static OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
